chapter_title.ar: باب نِكَاحِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ وَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ يُسْلِمُ بَعْضُهُمْ وَ لَا يُسْلِمُ بَعْضٌ أَوْ يُسْلِمُونَ جَمِيعاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – The marriage of the Ahl Al-Zimma, and the Polytheists, some of them become Muslim, and some of them do not become Muslims, or they all become Muslims altogether

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/202)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/202)
text: الذِّمِّيُّ تَكُونُ لَهُ الْمَرْأَةُ الذِّمِّيَّةُ فَتُسْلِمُ امْرَأَتُهُ قَالَ هِيَ امْرَأَتُهُ يَكُونُ عِنْدَهَا بِالنَّهَارِ وَ لَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهَا بِاللَّيْلِ قَالَ فَإِنْ أَسْلَمَ الرَّجُلُ وَ لَمْ تُسْلِمِ الْمَرْأَةُ يَكُونُ الرَّجُلُ عِنْدَهَا بِاللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus who said,

‘The Zimmy man happens to have the Zimmy wife for him. So his wife becomes a Muslim. She is his wife, to be with him by the day and not be with him at night’. Heasws said: ‘So if the man had become a Mulim and the wife did not become a Muslim, the man can be with her at night and the day’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a taxpayer man who had a taxpayer wife and she became a Muslim, he (the Imam) said, ‘She is his wife who stays with him during the day but not during the night.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘If the man becomes a Muslim he stays with her during the night as well as the day.’”
